title: Gandeal-Fondor Hyperlane
content:

{{Quote|A great deal of cargo traffic is passing between Fondor and Gandeal. The CMG member surmises that new hyperlanes have been opened by the Empire to serve the system, judging by the number of bulk freighters passing into and out of the shipyards.|[[Independent Traders' Infonet/Legends|Independent Traders' Infonet]]|<ref name="GNN5">{{JournalCite|5|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>}}
The '''Gandeal-Fondor Hyperlane''' was a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|route]] blazed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] with [[S-thread booster/Legends|S-thread boosters]] for use in efficiently ferrying supplies and starships between [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]] and [[Gandeal]].<ref name="TEA" />

The hyperlane was also an efficient means of traveling between other [[Core Worlds/Legends|core world]], for example a trip from [[Ruan]] to Fondor could be cut by three hyperspace jumps through the use of the hyperlane.<ref name="AoC2:JE">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''</ref>

Despite its efficiency, the route was a tightly held secret by the Empire. It was in fact due to the presence of the secret [[Scarl]] [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] on this route.<ref name="TEA" /> After the Empire abandoned its [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] facilities at Fondor, the secrecy surrounding the route kept it hidden from all but the best informed spacers.<ref name="AoC2:JE" />
